#labs

# Lab 1 — Cisco Basic IOS Configurations

## Source

https://drive.google.com/file/d/12JEAVTPlrxK2Xl1zhe7bP7jYF51hOLbt/view

## Topic

- `Basic IOS Configuration`
- `Switch SVI setup`
- `Password recovery`

## Related Book Modules

- [[Book 1. Introduction to Networks/02 - Basic Switch and End Devices Configuration/02 - Basic Switch and End Devices Configuration|Book 1 Module 2 — Basic Switch and End Devices Configuration]]
- [[Book 2. Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials/01 - Basic Device Configuration/01 - Basic Device Configuration|Book 2 Module 1 — Basic Device Configuration]]

> [!tip] Memory Hook
> Эта лаба — фундамент. Всё что делается с switches (hostname, passwords, SVI, banner) повторяется в каждой следующей лабке.

---

<br>

Laboratory work. Cisco Basic IOS Configurations

**Ip addressing table:** 

Table 1


| Device name | Interface | Ip address | Subnet Mask   | Default Gateway |
| ----------- | --------- | ---------- | ------------- | --------------- |
| S1          | SVI       | 10.44.0.1  | 255.255.255.0 | 10.44.0.254     |
| S2          | SVI       | 10.44.0.2  | 255.255.255.0 | 10.44.0.254     |
| PC1         | NIC       | 10.44.0.10 | 255.255.255.0 | 10.44.0.254     |
| PC2         | NIC       | 10.44.0.20 | 255.255.255.0 | 10.44.0.254     |

### PART a. Configure and test BASIC IOS. Task

1. Observe network topology
2. Give Ip addresses to end devices using addressing table
3. Using console cables connect  S1 and PC1 and S2 with PC2. On PC you should use RS 232 connector and console connector on Switches
    ![](data:image/png;base64,)
4. Conduct Basic IOS configurations on S1 and S2 using information below through PC1 and PC2.
    

Table 2

|   |   |   |
|---|---|---|
|**Item to be configured**|S1|S2|
|hostname|teach|data|
|USER EXEC mode password|dog|snake|
|PRIV EXEC mode unencrypted password|craft|thrive|
|Remote connection password|lecture|tv|
|Legal notification|Authorized Users Only|Authorized Users Only|

4. Secure password
5. Configure SVI and default gateway on switches
6. Configurations should be saved to the NVRAM 

  

**Part b. Resetting IOS and checking the configurations** 0. Now connect to R1. Both console password and remote passwords are not known. On top of it the terminal cannot be viewed more than 1 second. This was misconfigured for some reason. How would you reset it? Reset the password and access to R1 and change its hostname R1 1. Configure the following Ip address to the R1's g0/1 interface 192.168.1.254 / subnet mask: 255.255.0.0

Configure g0/0's ip address to be 10.44.0.254/24 2. Connect remotely to S3. (password cisco123) 3. find a flag and submit it to google form
![[Pasted image 20260418173741.png]]




----
Solution
# Cisco Basic IOS — Краткая инструкция

## IP таблица

|Device|IP|Mask|Gateway|
|---|---|---|---|
|S1|10.44.0.1|255.255.255.0|10.44.0.254|
|S2|10.44.0.2|255.255.255.0|10.44.0.254|
|PC1|10.44.0.10|255.255.255.0|10.44.0.254|
|PC2|10.44.0.20|255.255.255.0|10.44.0.254|

---

## 1. PC1 и PC2 — задать IP (8%)

Desktop → IP Configuration → вбить по таблице

---

## 2. S1 (45%)

```
enable
configure terminal
hostname teach
line console 0
 password dog
 login
exit
enable password craft
line vty 0 15
 password lecture
 login
exit
banner motd # Authorized Users Only #
service password-encryption
interface vlan 1
 ip address 10.44.0.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
exit
ip default-gateway 10.44.0.254
copy running-config startup-config
```

---

## 3. S2 (70%)

```
enable
configure terminal
hostname data
line console 0
 password snake
 login
exit
enable password thrive
line vty 0 15
 password tv
 login
exit
banner motd # Authorized Users Only #
service password-encryption
interface vlan 1
 ip address 10.44.0.2 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
exit
ip default-gateway 10.44.0.254
copy running-config startup-config
```

---

## 4. Сброс пароля R1 (72%)

```
1. Выключить R1 → включить → Ctrl+Break → ROMMON
confreg 0x2142
reset

2. После загрузки:
enable
copy startup-config running-config
configure terminal
line console 0
 exec-timeout 0 0
exit
hostname R1
config-register 0x2102
copy running-config startup-config
```

---

## 5. Настройка R1 (86%)

```
configure terminal
interface gigabitEthernet 0/0
 ip address 10.44.0.254 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
exit
interface gigabitEthernet 0/1
 ip address 192.168.1.254 255.255.0.0
 no shutdown
exit
copy running-config startup-config
```

---

## 6. Найти IP S3 через R1

```
ping 0.0.0.0
```

> IP S3 = **192.168.23.147**

---

## 7. Подключиться к S3 (89%)

```
telnet 192.168.23.147
# пароль: cisco123

copy flash: running-config
Source filename []? flag.txt
Destination filename [running-config]? (Enter)

show running-config
```

> 🏁 Флаг в description интерфейсов: **INF_313{MY_FIRST_FLAG}**
